productDisplayName: Vans Men Old Skool Black Casual Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by skate boarders, Old Skool shoes come in a classic low top design that are skate board friendly. Team these with cargos or jeans and graphic tees. Upper Suede and fabric uppers for durability and comfort Leather overlays on the sides and stitch detailing for added comfort and reinforcement Padded collar, tongue and textile lining for extra comfort Lace-ups for a snug Fit Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole Rubber outsole for durability Reverse waffle pattern for better grip Lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toes shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
